problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus may resolve Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
